name: directory layout: initial v1.9 ships ~38 rule files across the namespace folders
command: count=$(find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 3 -name "*.yaml" -not -path "*/_operator/*" -not -path "*/_community/*" -not -path "*/_meta/*" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$count" -ge 38 ] && echo "ok count=$count" 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL count=$count expected >=38" 1>&2; exit 1; }
